posts.title: Why I keep building random stuff in my garage
posts.summary: An origin story involving a broken coffee maker, too much free time, and absolutely no formal training.
posts.body:
It started with a coffee maker. It broke, I refused to just buy a new one out of spite, and somehow that turned into a hobby that now takes up an entire shelf in my garage.

This blog is where I'll post the actual stories behind the projects you'll find in the workshop section — the parts that didn't work, the late-night "why-is-this-smoking" moments, and the occasional win that actually goes to plan.

If you're new here: welcome. Pull up a stool, the soldering iron's already hot.
